title: McDoom Enchantables
description: Allows MCDoom Weapons to be enchanted
body:
___________ ### About ___________ AzureDoom, the mod Author of [MCdoom](https://github.com/AzureDoom/MCDoom/tree/fabric1.17) , has declared all the weapons and guns in MCDoom will be blacklisted from enchanting due to being overpowered. FWI MCdoom uses Durability to determine ammo which is crucial in a mod that revolves around demons, guns and ammunition. kinda understandable when someone can manipulate ammo count via Exp sounds a tad bit Unbalanced. 

this mod basically bypass that via mixin. simple. 
it obviously **required MCdoom to work.**


for the record this is not an attempt to disrespect or mock AzureDoom's work. Hell i actually adore his work. I just want to break my game with magically enchanced guns.

___________

### Future Plans ( if im still alive to care that is )
___________
- just blacklist everything the doom weapons from durability based enchantments. (Mending,Unbreaking, etc.)
